## Type of change

- [ ] Improvement to existing functionality

## Checklist

- [ ] I have tested this against a real Proxmox environment (or noted that it's untested)
- [ ] No secrets, API tokens, or personal details are included
- [ ] `terraform.tfvars` and `ansible/vars/secrets.yml` are not committed
- [ ] README updated if the change affects setup steps
